entries.name: Warden
entries.description: Holds the line. The Warden's turn soaks the hit somebody else couldn't and answers with worked steel — shield the soft, break the hard. No one else in the party can stand where the Warden stands.

entries.name: Ashcaller
entries.description: Reads the mountain's moods. The Ashcaller's turn burns what steel can't bite and mends what the deep breaks — first to act, fragile as lamp-glass, never idle. No one else in the party can burn or heal at all.
